creator: freebsd@skysmurf.nl
text:
Created attachment 170558
SVN diff that modifies Makefile and distinfo according to the new version.

Straightforward update of x11/xtrlock to the latest version 2.8 by the maintainer.

A build/QA log can be found here: http://www.skysmurf.nl/~fonz/tmp/xtrlock.log
Note that the QA setuid warning is OK in this case: Xtrlock is a screen locker after all.
